title: ONE LAST Breath
lyrics: So damn, I'm down to just one breath I'm taken out of my final breath You took my heart again I'm down to one last breath I'm down to one last breath I'm down, I'm down to one last breath There's no way you can see it I'm down for you I've been down to hustle out so many times I can't understand my own song Now you wanna write me a new one You can pin my paddle left to right And make me come and tell me the demons I fight in my own life Took my vulnerability and smashed me When it took all my insecurities Then you forced me to chill Now you got me too much Well, I'm down to one last thing for you I'm down to one last breath I'm down to one last breath Oh, the sight of you makes me want to be done And have this be the last I see of you Cause I'm down to just one breath Darkness creeps in my mind Because you take away all the solid ego That you had helped to build Now you look like you want something else Now I'm just a shell, baby Kill me now, break me open and rip my insides Cause no one wants a broken me Now you make sure I've lost that spark Cause I'm down to one last breath I'm down to one last breath with you I'm down to one last breath for you Oh, I'm down to one last breath As the sideways eats me down As the blind ways feed me From that love I said that I would give my own muse I collectively wrap with me Off the balcony, one last breath See my eyes go black I'm down, I'm down to one last breath See me do the same See me do the things that you wanted me to be Me to be See me do the architecture of the thing that I'm never free From you and your mind Watch me die here The semblance of the thing that used to make you smile I'm down to one last breath Moving by my own, baby, yeah Don't ever come back here no more, no more Jackie, get it? Hit the road, Jackie, get it?

lyricsSegments.text: So damn, I'm down to just one breath
I'm taken out of my final breath
You took my heart again
I'm down to one last breath
I'm down to one last breath
I'm down, I'm down to one last breath
There's no way you can see it
I'm down for you
I've been down to hustle out so many times
I can't understand my own song
Now you wanna write me a new one
You can pin my paddle left to right
And make me come and tell me the demons I fight in my own life
Took my vulnerability and smashed me
When it took all my insecurities
Then you forced me to chill
Now you got me too much
Well, I'm down to one last thing for you
I'm down to one last breath
I'm down to one last breath
Oh, the sight of you makes me want to be done
And have this be the last I see of you
Cause I'm down to just one breath
Darkness creeps in my mind
Because you take away all the solid ego
That you had helped to build
Now you look like you want something else
Now I'm just a shell, baby
Kill me now, break me open and rip my insides
Cause no one wants a broken me
Now you make sure I've lost that spark
Cause I'm down to one last breath
I'm down to one last breath with you
I'm down to one last breath for you
Oh, I'm down to one last breath
As the sideways eats me down
As the blind ways feed me
From that love I said that I would give my own muse
I collectively wrap with me
Off the balcony, one last breath
See my eyes go black
I'm down, I'm down to one last breath
See me do the same
See me do the things that you wanted me to be
Me to be
See me do the architecture of the thing that I'm never free
From you and your mind
Watch me die here
The semblance of the thing that used to make you smile
I'm down to one last breath
Moving by my own, baby, yeah
Don't ever come back here no more, no more
Jackie, get it?
Hit the road, Jackie, get it?
